headline.promise_compression: Complete fibromyalgia guide in accessible language

schema_analysis.existing_schema: No one understands or believes my fibromyalgia pain
schema_analysis.new_schema: 10 million people have FM - here's everything you need to know to cope
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Author's personal journey + comprehensive content + relatable struggle

headline.vsl_adaptation: Do you suffer from chronic muscle aches and pains, sleepless nights, and morning stiffness for no apparent reason? You're not alone. 10 million Americans have the same condition - and there's finally a book that explains everything...

lead.opening_verbatim: Do you suffer from chronic muscle aches and pains, sleepless nights and morning stiffness, for no apparent reason? Fibromyalgia may be the culprit for these and many other symptoms. That's what award-winning author Miryam Ehrlich Williamson learned in 1993 after a last-ditch effort to visit a doctor for help with her suffering.
lead.transition_to_body: Her chronic pain, sleep disturbances and fatigue, just to name a few symptoms, are all a part of a bigger disorder known, and not easily diagnosed, as fibromyalgia (FM).

proof_elements.verbatim: approximately 10 million people in the US
detailed Table of Contents, detailed Index, Glossary of important terms, a list of important articles, and two informative Appendices

key_sections.content_verbatim: Upon learning about her illness for the first time, and how its causes are unknown and therefore incurable, Miryam drove to the library, where no articles were to be found on FM. She went to the bookstore, where no books could be bought on the subject. She visited an information service on her computer and searched for everything beginning with fibro, which lead her to fibrositis, which is an old-fashioned term for fibromyalgia.

After years of being disregarded by physicians, who thought it was 'all in her head,' Miryam finally got an answer to her problem, only now she had even more questions, with few places to seek out the truth.

Fibromyalgia is a common and disabling disorder, characterized by widespread musculoskeletal pain, fatigue, and multiple tender points. It is a syndrome, as opposed to a disease, because its cause is uncertain. It is probable that heredity predisposes individuals to the condition, but that it does not manifest itself until certain aggravating factors, like cold drafts, humidity, physical and emotional stress, barometric pressure, and more, come into play later in life.

book_contents_preview: How to find the right doctor (one who understands FM, how to help you and treat you with respect)
Which medications and non-drug therapies may work best and when to use them
How you can benefit from proper diet, physical therapy, massage and meditation
The benefits of exercise; avoiding unnecessary physical and emotional stress
How to detect and treat FM in children

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Effective condition-specific info marketing targeting underserved market
notable_elements: Publishers Choice / National Syndications later became MagniLife - major alt-health marketer
The 'all in her head' dismissal creates powerful reader identification
Information scarcity in 2001 made this more valuable
Plain, easy-to-read language positioning removes intimidation
extraction_notes.key_insight: The author-as-fellow-sufferer positioning creates instant credibility and rapport - readers feel understood before reading a word of the book
